input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.10.5.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.10.5.2
            TITLE: accumulator containers must:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.10.5.2: Accumulator Containers must:
F.10.5.2 Accumulator Containers must: 
a. Attach to the Major Structure of the chassis  
A maximum of two attachment points may be on a chassis tube between two 
triangulated nodes. 
b. Not attach to the Shoulder Harness Mounting

final_answer: F.10.5.2 Accumulator Containers must: a. Attach to the Major Structure of the chassis A maximum of two attachment points may be on a chassis tube between two triangulated nodes. b. Not attach to the Shoulder Harness Mounting
